name: SecureVector Guard
description: Real-time AI threat monitoring and tool permission enforcement for OpenClaw agents

url.description: SecureVector API base URL (auto-detected from svconfig.yml if not set)

apiKey.description: API key for SecureVector (supports secret references)

threshold.description: Minimum risk score to surface threat alerts

url.label: SecureVector URL
url.help: Base URL of the SecureVector instance (fallback: SECUREVECTOR_URL env var).

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for remote SecureVector instances (fallback: SECUREVECTOR_API_KEY env var).
